summary: Phase 3 release: velocity-aware fingertip tracking, lower-latency hand ink, guarded pinch hysteresis, bounded closed-fist and occlusion stroke continuity, retained hand guide, and reliable camera-hand eraser behavior.
features: The drawing point uses a velocity-aware stabilizer with bounded prediction so fast intentional fingertip motion tracks more closely without accepting detector jumps.
Hand ink no longer receives the full UI smoothing twice; the second pass is reduced specifically for camera drawing to remove the laggy rubber-band effect.
Pinch drawing keeps a short bounded continuation through a closed fist, one-frame landmark loss, or temporary ambiguity; no new ink is added until tracking is safe again.
The closed-fist guide hold is extended to 560 ms, preserving visible hand feedback across normal finger occlusion without freezing after the hand leaves frame.
A tracked jump ends the active stroke immediately, while a camera-hand eraser remains pinch-gated and keeps its target aligned to calibrated hand coordinates.

buildPolicy.fallback: npm run model:sync remains recovery-only; production clients use the verified local asset.
buildPolicy.runtimeNetwork: no remote MediaPipe module or model is loaded by the deployed browser; Phase 3 tracking and continuity run locally.
